name: chat2db-community
author: 爱獭科技（杭州）有限公司

scripts.build:web:2java: yarn run build:web:prod && rm -rf ../chat2db-community-server/chat2db-community-start/src/main/resources/thymeleaf/* && cp -r dist/index.html ../chat2db-community-server/chat2db-community-start/src/main/resources/thymeleaf/
scripts.build:web:desktop: cross-env UMI_ENV=desktop cross-env APP_NAME=chat2db-pro cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} cross-env PRINT_LOGS=${npm_config_print_logs} cross-env APP_PORT=${npm_config_app_port} umi build
scripts.build:web:desktop:test: cross-env UMI_ENV=desktop cross-env APP_NAME=chat2db-pro-test cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} cross-env PRINT_LOGS=${npm_config_print_logs} cross-env APP_PORT=${npm_config_app_port} umi build
scripts.build:web:community: cross-env UMI_ENV=community cross-env APP_NAME=chat2db-community cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} cross-env PRINT_LOGS=${npm_config_print_logs} cross-env APP_PORT=${npm_config_app_port} umi build
scripts.build:web:community:test: cross-env UMI_ENV=community cross-env APP_NAME=chat2db-community-test cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} cross-env PRINT_LOGS=${npm_config_print_logs} cross-env APP_PORT=${npm_config_app_port} umi build
scripts.build:web:offline: cross-env UMI_ENV=offline cross-env APP_NAME=chat2db-local cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} cross-env PRINT_LOGS=${npm_config_print_logs} cross-env APP_PORT=${npm_config_app_port} umi build
scripts.build:web:offline:test: cross-env UMI_ENV=offline cross-env APP_NAME=chat2db-local-test cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} cross-env PRINT_LOGS=${npm_config_print_logs} cross-env APP_PORT=${npm_config_app_port} umi build
scripts.build:web:prod: cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} cross-env APP_PORT=${npm_config_app_port} cross-env UMI_PublicPath=${npm_config_public_path} umi build
scripts.modify:package:name: node ./scripts/modify-package-name.js
scripts.start:desktop:hot: cross-env UMI_ENV=desktop cross-env APP_VERSION=${npm_config_app_version} PORT=8888 umi dev
scripts.start:community:hot: cross-env UMI_ENV=community cross-env APP_NAME=chat2db-community cross-env DISABLE_MFSU=true cross-env UMI_DEV_SERVER_COMPRESS=none cross-env PORT=8889 umi dev --public_path=/
scripts.start:offline:hot: cross-env UMI_ENV=offline cross-env PORT=8888 umi dev
